title: Ithor Loman
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Ithor Loman''' was a [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] in [[Rytal Prime]] presumably owned by [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian's]]. [[Talon Karrde]] first met [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jutka]] there, who warned him about the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Rei'Kas]]. Karrde was later confronted by [[Xern]] and several other members of Rei'Kas' gang. Most were killed by Karrde's crew, while Xern was allowed to escape.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
